title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Sugar Cosmetics

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Sugar Cosmetics
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Sugar Cosmetics! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Sugar Cosmetics:
Sugar Cosmetics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sugar Cosmetics!
